task_objective: Enhance YData-like theme with single-page layout and improved visuals
design_decisions: Restructured YData-like theme into a single-page vertical layout for better scannability.
Implemented sticky header with anchor links to sections (#overview, #variables, #missing, #sample).
Set variable details to be expanded by default for immediate visibility.
Compressed non-numeric variable details directly into the card and removed the toggle button for those types.
Replaced 'NaN' text with 'Null' in report visuals for clearer user communication.
Improved HistogramChart spacing and padding to prevent label overlap.
Added a 'Frequency Summary' to categorical variable details to close the feature gap.
results: Theme updated and verified visually with a new complex dataset generation script.
